purpose: proves that preflight binds the immutable pull base to one live remote identity, one requested scope, and one short-lived push session
required_invariants: preflight is the first live-remote binding step after importer provenance exists
preflight binds one immutable pull base package to one live remote identity and one short-lived session
preflight records requested scope but does not reserve remote state
preflight authentication must be at least as strict as current Reprint HMAC usage
preflight does not authorize dry-run, apply, or recovery on its own
